author: Raghvendra Singh
review:
It's never the amenities but the management/the people running this place.
The quality of management is more important than the amenities offered by a place. During our tour of this property, my wife and I encountered a rude property

author: Cam Bridgerson
review: Awesome property and very helpful staff! I noticed in someone else's review on here that a few things are not true.
